intro: Leucostegia perdurans, also known as the Mountain Oak Fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
